//: Staged for the future standalone repo (see ../SPLIT-PLAN.md). Not consumed yet — today the monorepo root package.json + relative imports are authoritative. The exports/files maps below are live-ready so consumers can resolve grain's docs + assets from the installed package (e.g. import.meta.resolve('@tjakoen/grain/docs/GRAIN.md')), which is how the portfolio renders /grain/docs without copying files. Root '.' entry (the TS composition surface) is added at extraction.
name: @tjakoen/grain
description: GRAIN — an AI-interaction design system where every surface is operable by both a human and an AI through one shared vocabulary.
author: Tjakoen Stolk <tjakoen.s@gmail.com> (https://tjakoen.github.io)
